name: gjsify
description: The full JavaScript ecosystem, native on GNOME

scripts.test:e2e: node --test tests/lint-engines.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/create-app/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-only/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/standalone-plugin/run.mjs
scripts.npm:publish: yarn run build && yarn run build:examples && yarn workspaces foreach -v --all --no-private --exclude '@girs/*' npm publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public
scripts.build: yarn run build:infra && yarn workspaces foreach --topological -p --no-private --all --exclude '@girs/*' --exclude '@gjsify/example-*' --exclude '@gjsify/website' run build
scripts.build:infra: yarn workspace @gjsify/esbuild-plugin-alias run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/esbuild-plugin-deepkit run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/esbuild-plugin-transform-ext run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/esbuild-plugin-blueprint run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/esbuild-plugin-gjsify run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/cli run build

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
